changeLog: Chat text is selectable + copyable. Drag-select + Ctrl+C now works on user bubbles, AI responses, tool input/output rows, and error messages — ReadOnly InputTextMultiline replaces Text/TextWrapped. Word wrap is done manually (binary search on byte position, utf-8-safe so CJK glyphs don't split) and cached per event so frozen messages don't re-measure each frame. The ✱ thinking spinner placeholder stays non-selectable. Status-bar hint reads '拖选可复制' instead of 'Ctrl+W 关闭'. ui.lua only — chat / provider / http / tools / json untouched.
